scripts.predev: bun run scripts/fetch-mirrored-docs.ts && bun run scripts/fetch-contributing.ts && bun run scripts/fetch-releases.ts
scripts.prebuild: bun run scripts/fetch-mirrored-docs.ts && bun run scripts/fetch-contributing.ts && bun run scripts/fetch-releases.ts && bun run scripts/validate-frontmatter.ts
scripts.check: svelte-kit sync && bun run scripts/fetch-mirrored-docs.ts && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
